inputs.extracted_data:
## Candidate Snapshot
- Name: Aryan Sharma
- Current Role: Senior Data Scientist
- Total Experience (if explicitly stated): 4+ years

## Skills
- Technical Skills: Python, SQL, R, ML/AI, Data Engineering, Visualization
- Tools/Platforms: LangChain, LangSmith, OpenAI API, HuggingFace, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, FastAPI, Git, Jupyter, VS Code, Postman, AWS, GCP, Azure ML
- Domains: Not mentioned

## Education & Certifications
- Education: M.Tech in Data Science & AI – IIT Bombay (2020), B.E. in Computer Engineering – Pune University (2018)
- Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning – Specialty (2023), Google Professional Data Engineer (2022), Deep Learning Specialization – Coursera / DeepLearning.AI (2021)

## Key Evidence
- Built an LLM-based document intelligence platform using LangChain + OpenAI GPT-4, reducing manual review time by 65%.
- Designed modular RAG pipelines with LangSmith tracing for production monitoring and debugging.
- Trained a custom NER model on 200K+ resumes achieving 91% F1-score for skill extraction.
- Deployed Airflow-orchestrated ML pipelines on AWS SageMaker serving 2M+ predictions/month.
- Developed churn prediction model (XGBoost) achieving AUC-ROC of 0.93 for a telecom client.
inputs.job_description:
## Role Overview
- Job Title: Senior Data Scientist/AI Engineer
- Seniority: Senior
- Experience Required: 4+ years

## Core Requirements
- Must-Have Skills: Advanced proficiency in LangChain, RAG, LLM Fine-tuning, Python, ETL pipeline design, FastAPI, Docker, and experience with AWS (SageMaker) or GCP (Vertex AI)
- Nice-to-Have Skills: Not mentioned
- Tools/Platforms: LangSmith, LangChain, RAG, FastAPI, Docker, AWS (SageMaker), GCP (Vertex AI)

## Responsibilities
- Lead the development of a next-generation Generative AI platform
- Build production-ready NLP pipelines
- Develop LLM-based solutions
- Design and deploy ETL pipelines
- Deploy models on cloud platforms (AWS or GCP)
- Debug, trace, and monitor production pipelines using LangSmith
- Containerize applications using Docker

## Evaluation Priorities
- Minimum 4+ years of industry experience in Data Science and Machine Learning
- Advanced proficiency in LangChain, RAG, and LLM Fine-tuning
- Hands-on experience with LangSmith for debugging, tracing, and monitoring
- Deep knowledge of Python, ETL pipeline design, FastAPI, and Docker
- Experience deploying models on AWS (SageMaker) or GCP (Vertex AI)

outputs.output:
## Decision Summary
- Recommendation: Strong Fit
- Fit Score: 92/100

## Score Breakdown
- Skill Match (0-40): 38
  - Aryan Sharma has advanced proficiency in LangChain, Python, and experience with AWS, which are must-have skills for the role.
- Experience Relevance (0-40): 38
  - With 4+ years of experience in Data Science and Machine Learning, Aryan meets the minimum experience requirement.
- Tool/Platform Alignment (0-20): 16
  - Aryan has hands-on experience with LangSmith, LangChain, FastAPI, Docker, and AWS, which are required tools and platforms for the role.

## Matched Strengths
- Advanced proficiency in LangChain, Python, and experience with AWS
- Hands-on experience with LangSmith for debugging, tracing, and monitoring
- Deep knowledge of Python, ETL pipeline design, and Docker
- Experience deploying models on AWS (SageMaker)
- Strong educational background in Data Science and AI

## Missing or Weak Areas
- Limited information about experience with GCP (Vertex AI)
- No explicit mention of RAG pipeline design experience, although Aryan has experience with LangSmith and LangChain
- No information about experience with containerization using Docker in a production environment

## Interview Focus Areas
- Can you walk us through your experience with RAG pipeline design and how you've applied it in previous projects?
- How do you approach debugging and monitoring production pipelines using LangSmith, and what tools do you use?
- How do you stay up-to-date with the latest developments in Generative AI, and can you give an example of a recent project where you applied this knowledge?
